properties.period: Iron Age / Saul-David era with later-reference notes
source_notes: Coordinates are modern approximate site coordinates or conventional identifications suitable for campaign-map play.
Ancient identifications range from secure archaeological sites to debated biblical toponyms; use confidence per feature.

classification_schema.settlement_class: Physical/gameplay class of the location; independent of owner_faction.
classification_schema.site_role: Array of strategic, economic, religious, or historical roles used by gameplay.
classification_schema.fortification_level: 0-5 abstraction: 0 none/unknown, 5 major fortified city or stronghold.
classification_schema.classification_confidence: high / medium / low confidence in this class for the primary Iron Age layer.
classification_schema.location_class_label: Short UI label; Godot should prefer this over keyword inference from kind.

properties.name: Gibeah
properties.notes: Benjaminite hill stronghold associated with Saul.

properties.name: Ramah
properties.notes: Traditional home region of Samuel in Benjaminite highlands.

properties.name: Nob
properties.notes: Location debated; placed near Jerusalem/Benjamin edge for gameplay.

properties.name: Jebus
properties.notes: Jerusalem/Jebus ridge with Gihon spring and strong defensive value.

properties.name: Bethlehem
properties.notes: Judahite hill-country town associated with David's family.

properties.name: Hebron
properties.notes: Major southern highland center and early Davidic capital; better treated as a fortified town/urban center than a castle.

properties.name: Keilah
properties.notes: Judah-Shephelah border town, useful for refuge and raids.

properties.name: Socoh
properties.notes: Elah Valley town near the Philistine-Judah conflict corridor.

properties.name: Azekah
properties.notes: Fortified site overlooking the Elah corridor.

properties.name: Lachish
properties.notes: Major fortified city guarding the southern Shephelah.

properties.name: Ziklag
properties.notes: Identification debated; placed in the southern borderland for prototype gameplay.

properties.name: En-gedi
properties.notes: Dead Sea oasis and refuge zone.

properties.name: Gath
properties.notes: Tell es-Safi/Tel Zafit, widely identified with Gath; major Philistine center.

properties.name: Ashkelon
properties.notes: Tel Ashkelon/ancient Ascalon coastal site, with port and trade value.

properties.name: Gaza
properties.notes: Historic Gaza core/Old City tell, the southern coastal hub and Egypt-road gateway.

properties.name: Ashdod
properties.notes: Tel Ashdod/Isdud, south of modern Ashdod; one of the Philistine pentapolis centers.

properties.name: Ekron
properties.notes: Tel Miqne/Khirbet el-Muqanna, inland Philistine center near the Shephelah edge.

properties.name: Aphek
properties.notes: Road and water chokepoint near the Yarqon springs/Antipatris area.

properties.name: Shiloh
properties.notes: Highland sanctuary site north of Benjamin.

properties.name: Gilboa
properties.notes: Strategic ridge above Jezreel and Beth-shean routes.

properties.name: Shechem
properties.notes: Major central highland city between Mount Gerizim and Mount Ebal.

properties.name: Beth-shean
properties.notes: Key Jezreel-Jordan valley node.

properties.name: Jericho
properties.notes: Major oasis and ascent point to Benjamin/Jerusalem.

properties.name: Hazor
properties.notes: Major northern site near Hula and upper Jordan routes.

properties.name: Dan
properties.notes: Upper Jordan spring source and northern gate.

properties.name: Tyre
properties.notes: Northern maritime power edge.

properties.name: Rabbah
properties.notes: Ammonite center at modern Amman.

properties.name: Dibon
properties.notes: Moabite plateau city, important in later Mesha context.

properties.name: Bozrah
properties.notes: Northern Edomite/Seir edge marker.

properties.name: Beersheba
properties.notes: Southern water and administration node.

properties.name: Kadesh-barnea
properties.notes: Important southern oasis zone and frontier marker; modeled as a water-dependent oasis outpost rather than a normal village.

properties.name: Heshbon
properties.notes: Transjordan plateau town placed as an Ammon-Moab border hub for gameplay.

properties.name: Jazer
properties.notes: Fertile Gilead-edge village; identification varies, placed west of Rabbah for map play.

properties.name: Minnith
properties.notes: Ammonite wheat-growing place known from textual references; location is approximate.

properties.name: Abel-keramim
properties.notes: Ammonite vineyard settlement placed south of Rabbah as a rural supply point.

properties.name: Jogbehah
properties.notes: Gilead highland village placed between Rabbah and the northern approaches.

properties.name: Aroer of Ammon
properties.notes: Eastern Ammonite border point used to make the Rabbah hinterland feel settled.

properties.name: Medeba
properties.notes: Central plateau town north of Dibon, useful as Moab's northern market node.

properties.name: Kir-hareseth
properties.notes: Southern Moabite fortress, conventionally associated with the Karak highland area.

properties.name: Sela
properties.notes: Rocky Edomite stronghold marker in the Seir highland approaches.

properties.name: Teman
properties.notes: Southern Edomite village marker; location is approximate for campaign-scale play.

properties.name: Punon
properties.notes: Arabah copper-working zone placed near Faynan for trade and raiding hooks.

properties.name: Tawilan
properties.notes: Edomite highland village near the Petra basin, useful as a southern patrol stop.

properties.name: Seir Camp
properties.notes: Nomadic Edomite camp added to break up the empty Seir ridges.

properties.name: Timna Copper Camp
properties.notes: Southern copper district marker at the edge of the playable desert.

properties.name: Sidon
properties.notes: Northern Phoenician port added above Tyre to make the coast feel like a real maritime corridor.

properties.name: Sarepta
properties.notes: Coastal village between Tyre and Sidon, useful for trade-road density.

properties.name: Achzib
properties.notes: Fortified coastal site north of Akko, outside the Israelite core.

properties.name: Akko
properties.notes: Harbor town on the northern coastal road, kept Phoenician/neutral for this prototype layer.

properties.name: Dor
properties.notes: Southern coastal town added as a non-Philistine maritime waypoint.

properties.name: Damascus
properties.notes: Aramean power center on the northeast edge of the campaign map.

properties.name: Abel-beth-maacah
properties.notes: Northern border town placed in the Aram/Geshur/Maacah frontier belt.

properties.name: Geshur
properties.notes: Small Aramean kingdom marker east of the upper Jordan and Sea of Galilee.

properties.name: Ashtaroth
properties.notes: Bashan town on the northern Transjordan road network.

properties.name: Edrei
properties.notes: Bashan stronghold placed near the eastern road edge.

properties.name: Salecah
properties.notes: Far eastern Bashan marker on the edge of the playable map.

properties.name: Abel-shittim
properties.notes: Jordan plain village east of Jericho, useful as a crossing-side waypoint.

properties.name: Adam
properties.notes: Jordan crossing settlement, placed to make the river road less empty.

properties.name: Succoth
properties.notes: Jordan valley settlement near the Jabbok approaches.

properties.name: Penuel
properties.notes: Watch settlement on the Jabbok route into Gilead.

properties.name: Arad
properties.notes: Negev fortified site, assigned to local clans for the pre-monarchy frontier feel.

properties.name: Hormah
properties.notes: Southern hill-country edge village placed between Beersheba and the open desert.

properties.name: Tel Masos
properties.notes: Negev settlement on desert exchange routes near the Beersheba basin.

properties.name: Tamar
properties.notes: Arabah outpost and water point between Edom and the Dead Sea approaches.

properties.name: Kenite Camp
properties.notes: Mobile clan camp in the southern borderland, useful for non-royal desert contacts.

properties.name: Amalekite Camp
properties.notes: Desert raider camp placed south of Ziklag for future threat and rumor hooks.

properties.name: Midianite Well
properties.notes: Southern desert well added as a remote non-Israelite waystop.

properties.name: Megiddo
properties.notes: Major road and valley fortress.
